title: tecoma weberbaueriana
intro: Tecoma weberbaueriana, also known as the Yellow Trumpetbush or Yellow Flowering Trumpet, is a flowering plant species native to the tropical forests of South America. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine, particularly in Peru, for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties due to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Tecoma weberbaueriana include reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and alleviating digestive problems. The plant can be prepared for medicinal use through herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are made by steeping the leaves and flowers in hot water or a solvent like ethanol.
